cases.input: Our signup verification emails are landing in Gmail's spam folder. We send from no-reply@app.example.com via SendGrid. Fix deliverability.
cases.notes: Must resolve to email-sending; check SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment, not content.

cases.input: Build a responsive HTML welcome email that fires via firestore-send-email when a user document is created. Brand tokens are in design-tokens.md.
cases.notes: email-template-builder; ≤600px table, inline CSS, mail-collection doc shape.

cases.input: My CTA button looks fine in Gmail but renders as plain underlined text in Outlook 2016 on Windows. How do I make it bulletproof across both?
cases.notes: email-templates; expect VML roundrect + anchor fallback.

cases.input: We're launching a monthly product newsletter to 8,000 opted-in users. Help me decide the structure, subject strategy, and what metrics to track.
cases.notes: newsletter-design; single CTA, subject+preheader pair, CTOR over opens, UTMs.

cases.input: Our weekly digest open rate dropped from 24% to 16% over four issues but CTOR held at 9%. What's wrong and what should we change?
cases.notes: newsletter-design; steady CTOR + falling opens => deliverability, route to email-sending, do NOT rewrite copy.

cases.input: Should I just publish DMARC p=reject right away to stop spoofing of our billing@ address?
cases.notes: email-sending; must ramp none->quarantine->reject after rua review, not reject first.

cases.input: Can you help me with my emails? They're not working great.
cases.notes: Genuinely ambiguous; expect ONE clarifying question, not a guessed topic or an assumption tag.

cases.input: I need a new responsive receipt email AND I need to make sure it actually delivers from a brand-new domain we just bought.
cases.notes: Two topics; sequence builder -> sending (prerequisite order), one playbook at a time.

cases.input: Our marketing email shows a 'View entire message' link in Gmail and the unsubscribe footer is cut off. Why?
cases.notes: email-templates; HTML over ~102KB is clipped; trim to under 100KB.

cases.input: Set up SMS OTP delivery for our login flow.
cases.notes: Out of scope for email-comms (SMS/push route elsewhere); redirect, do not invent a topic.
